Configuration for OpenOCD using CMSIS-DAP interface with SWD transport.

# Purpose
The configuration file sets up the debugging environment by sourcing the `interface/cmsis-dap.cfg` file, which configures the CMSIS-DAP interface for debugging. It also selects the Serial Wire Debug (SWD) protocol as the transport method for communication between the debugger and the target device.
